mapper.sql: id, venue_code, venue_name, venue_type, difficulty_level, length, width, max_capacity, current_capacity, rental_price, status, image_url, description, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE venue_code = #{venueCode} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_venue (venue_code, venue_name, venue_type, difficulty_level, length, width, max_capacity, current_capacity, rental_price, status, image_url, description) VALUES (#{venueCode}, #{venueName}, #{venueType}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{length}, #{width}, #{maxCapacity}, #{currentCapacity}, #{rentalPrice}, #{status}, #{imageUrl}, #{description})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_venue
venue_code = #{venueCode}, venue_name = #{venueName}, venue_type = #{venueType}, difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel}, length = #{length}, width = #{width}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, current_capacity = #{currentCapacity}, rental_price = #{rentalPrice}, status = #{status}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, description = #{description},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE venue_type = #{venueType} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE status = 1 AND current_capacity < max_capacity AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_venue WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_venue WHERE is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_venue SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue SET current_capacity = #{count} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue SET current_capacity = current_capacity + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue SET current_capacity = current_capacity - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 AND current_capacity > 0
UPDATE t_venue SET current_capacity = current_capacity + #{count} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE t_venue SET current_capacity = GREATEST(current_capacity - #{count}, 0) WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
